title: filago montana var. arvensis
intro: Filago montana var. arvensis, also known as corn marigold or wild marigold, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Filago montana var. arvensis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Filago montana var. arvensis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
